scripts.desktop:dev: concurrently -k --names BACK,FRONT,ELECTRON --prefix-colors yellow,cyan,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:8001 http-get://localhost:3000 && cross-env ELECTRON_START_URL=http://localhost:3000 electron .
scripts.desktop:run: concurrently -k --names BACK,ELECTRON --prefix-colors yellow,magenta "npm run run:backend" "npm run run:electron"
